From: Sarah <sarah@curate.ai>
Sent: Monday, April 27, 2026 9:00 AM
To: Engineering Team <eng-team@curate.ai>
Subject: Q3 Infrastructure Planning

Hi Team,

As we look ahead to Q3, we need to start planning our infrastructure upgrades. The current cluster is reaching 80% capacity during peak hours.

Mike, can you pull the usage reports for the last 6 months? We need to see if the growth is linear or if there are specific spikes we need to account for.

Also, someone needs to research the new AWS graviton instances. I've heard they offer better price-performance for our workload. Elena, maybe you can take a look at that?

Lastly, we should probably schedule a dedicated brainstorming session for this.

Thanks,
Sarah

---

Subject: RE: Q3 Infrastructure Planning

Hi Sarah,

I'll get those reports to you by Wednesday.

Regarding Graviton, I think that's a great idea. Elena is out this week, but I can ask Jason to start the initial research.

Best,
Mike
